decisions.description: Find the related Account to later get the latest Closed Won Opportunity.
decisions.name: Account_Found
decisions.label: Account Found?

Flow.description:
Testing - Replace with the Subflow
Update Opportunity Post Close Won stages based on the School Object data. This Flow is responsible for updating Opportunity Stages - SSPR Collection and Completed
03.20.2025 - LK - Remove the required of Billing Training Scheduled Date for the OB Eligible Stage 03.21.2025 - LK - Add 2 formulas for CF Saas/Billing Onboarding Status - to update the In progress stage , post cw status = OBS Owned At Risk 03.24.2025 - LK - Fixed the Post CW Status Update picklist value - Fully Activated 03.25.2025 - adding Billing Setting Up Bills Stage Met Date to SSPR logic 04.10.2025 - Updates the new checkbox field - Post CW Set by Automation to allow the flow to bypass the validation rule that prevents users from updating the Post CW Stages 04.14.2025 - BW - Added logic to set AE Owned at Risk based on Billing Onboarding Status 04.18.2025 - LK - Added logic to evulate for Open Cancel Case 04.28.2025 - LK - Unresponsive Logic added, so if Post CW Status = Unresponsive, then don't evaluate the post cw stages. 05.06.2025 - LK - Added OBE Override logic 06.04.2025 - LK - Update Winback Logic for the SSPR Stage ( Update logic to treat the deal as a true winback only if the SSPR dates are more than 30 days before the Close Date.) 06.10.2025 - LK - Update logic to treat the deal as a true winback only if the SSPR dates are more than 4 days before the Close Date.) 07.31.2025 - LK Updated SSPR Logic and Added logic for self-serve and site add when training is declined 08.04.2025 - LK - Added Saas Onboarding Elgible Date and Billing Onboarding Eligible Date to entry criteria.

formulas.description: If anyone of the Billing Onboarding Status = Postponed, Unresponsive, SaaS At Risk, Billing At Risk, Requesting Postpone - Awaiting Approval, Requesting Opt Out Awaiting Approval, then Opp Stage = Onboarding in progress and Post CW Stage = OBS Owned at Risk
formulas.name: BillingOnboardingStatusRISK
formulas.expression: IF( OR( ISPICKVAL({!Get_Post_CW_Opportunity.Combined_Funnel__r.Billing_Onboarding_Status__c} , "Postponed"), ISPICKVAL({!Get_Post_CW_Opportunity.Combined_Funnel__r.Billing_Onboarding_Status__c} ,"Unresponsive"), ISPICKVAL({!Get_Post_CW_Opportunity.Combined_Funnel__r.Billing_Onboarding_Status__c} ,"SaaS At Risk"), ISPICKVAL({!Get_Post_CW_Opportunity.Combined_Funnel__r.Billing_Onboarding_Status__c} , "Billing At Risk"), ISPICKVAL({!Get_Post_CW_Opportunity.Combined_Funnel__r.Billing_Onboarding_Status__c} , "Requesting Postpone - Awaiting Approval"), ISPICKVAL({!Get_Post_CW_Opportunity.Combined_Funnel__r.Billing_Onboarding_Status__c} , "Requesting Opt Out - Awaiting Approval")), TRUE, FALSE)

formulas.description: if Approved_Accelerated_Onboarding_Date__c and Approved_OBE_Override_Date__c is blank then there is no OBE Override and all SSPR fields need to be evaluated. If one has a value, then this formula = true, that there is OBE Override.
formulas.name: OBEOverrideApproved

formulas.description: If anyone of the Saas Onboarding Status = Postponed, Unresponsive, SaaS At Risk, Billing At Risk, Requesting Postpone - Awaiting Approval, Requesting Opt Out Awaiting Approval, then Opp Stage = Onboarding in progress and Post CW Stage = OBS Owned at Risk
formulas.name: SaasOnboardingStatusRISK
formulas.expression: IF( OR( ISPICKVAL({!Get_Post_CW_Opportunity.Combined_Funnel__r.SaaS_Onboarding_Status__c} , "Postponed"), ISPICKVAL({!Get_Post_CW_Opportunity.Combined_Funnel__r.SaaS_Onboarding_Status__c} ,"Unresponsive"), ISPICKVAL({!Get_Post_CW_Opportunity.Combined_Funnel__r.SaaS_Onboarding_Status__c} ,"SaaS At Risk"), ISPICKVAL({!Get_Post_CW_Opportunity.Combined_Funnel__r.SaaS_Onboarding_Status__c} , "Billing At Risk"), ISPICKVAL({!Get_Post_CW_Opportunity.Combined_Funnel__r.SaaS_Onboarding_Status__c} , "Requesting Postpone - Awaiting Approval"), ISPICKVAL({!Get_Post_CW_Opportunity.Combined_Funnel__r.SaaS_Onboarding_Status__c} , "Requesting Opt Out - Awaiting Approval")), TRUE, FALSE)

Flow.interviewLabel: School Object - After Save - Post CW Opp Stages {!$Flow.CurrentDateTime}
Flow.label: School Object - After Save - Post CW Opp Stages

recordLookups.description: Get the Account that is related to the Newly created or updated School Object.
recordLookups.name: Get_Account
recordLookups.label: Get Account

recordLookups.description: Get the recently closed won opportunity that is one of the Post CW
recordLookups.name: Get_Post_CW_Opportunity
recordLookups.label: Get Post CW Opportunity
recordLookups.filterLogic: 1 AND ( 2 OR 3 OR 4 OR 5 ) AND 6 AND 7 AND ( 8 OR 9 OR 10 )

recordUpdates.description: Set the Post CW Set by Automation checkbox to TRUE to allow the flow to update the Opportunity Stage to a Post-CW value (e.g., SSPR, OB, Onboarding in Progress, Completed) without triggering the validation rule.
recordUpdates.name: Set_Post_CW_Set_by_Automation_on_Opp
recordUpdates.label: Set Post CW Set by Automation on Opp

subflows.name: Subflow_Post_Close_Won_Opportunity_Stage_Sync
subflows.label: Subflow - Post Close Won Opportunity Stage Sync
